title: Blueprint 15 Executive Director resigns as Children Rising Center project remains paused
summary: Blueprint 15 Executive Director has resigned while the Children Rising Center project (valued at $35 million) remains paused. The resignation raises questions about project leadership capacity and oversight of concurrent responsibilities. This represents a significant leadership change affecting a major capital initiative in Syracuse.

political_signal.description: Public commentary on executive leadership capacity and DEI hiring practices suggests constituent pressure and critical scrutiny of project governance and personnel decisions on a major $35M initiative.
